item.title: TF-dev
item.author: serialt
item.description: Dev terraform provider 基于新框架tpf开发 开发示例： https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-scaffolding-framework https://github.com/serialt/terraform-provider-demo https://github.com/serialt/terraform-provider-dnshe 参考示例： https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-hashicups 一、调试 provider 1、debug terraform # Makefile default: fmt lint install generate build: go build -v ./... install: build go install -v ./... lint: golangci-lint run generate: cd tools; go generate ./... fmt: gofmt -s
